item.title: Software Development Specializations: Which Path Should You Take?
item.category: "software development specializations" , "frontend vs backend developer" , "full stack developer career" , "mobile developer career" , "DevOps engineer career" , "data engineer career" , "machine learning engineer" , "embedded software developer" , "security engineer developer" , "which software development path"
item.description: Explore every major software development specialization including frontend, backend, full stack, mobile, DevOps, data engineering, machine learning, embedded systems, and security engineering.
